articles.title: Infantino’s Path to a Fourth FIFA Term Clears as Africa and Asia Pledge Support
articles.summary: Gianni Infantino’s re-election bid got a major boost as CAF and AFC endorsed him for a fourth term. With 101 of 211 votes now pledged, his path looks smooth — but controversy over term limits and his Trump ties lingers.

articles.title: Supreme Court Ruling Halts Louisiana Primaries, Throwing Midterm Map into Chaos
articles.summary: A Supreme Court decision striking down a majority-Black district has forced Louisiana to suspend its May 16 congressional primary. Early voting was set to begin Saturday; now officials scramble for a new map that could shift House control.

articles.title: From Empty Seats to Overflow Crowds: Turning Point’s Tour Ends with a Bang in Idaho
articles.summary: After low turnout and cancellations at earlier stops, Turning Point USA’s final tour event in Idaho drew a massive crowd. Over 1,000 fans were turned away as Matt Walsh and Michael Knowles headlined a night of debate and enthusiasm.
